items.question: What is the 3D Character Render AI workflow?
items.answer: 3D Character Render is an AI workflow for generating 3D-style character images that feel ready for key art, covers, store pages, and promotional materials. It focuses on high-impact visuals, not production meshes or rigs.

items.question: Can I start from an existing sketch or model screenshot?
items.answer: Yes. You can combine text prompts with rough sketches, grey-box models, or previous renders as references. This helps the workflow stay closer to your existing character design while exploring lighting, mood, and framing.

items.question: Is this suitable for game, animation, and comic projects?
items.answer: Absolutely. The workflow is designed for teams who need hero shots, thumbnails, and key visuals for characters—common in games, animation, comics, and IP-driven brands.

items.question: Does this workflow generate fully rigged 3D characters?
items.answer: No. It creates 3D-style images, not rigged or animatable 3D models. Use the outputs as visual targets or reference material for 3D artists and production pipelines.

items.question: What kind of control do I have over style and camera angles?
items.answer: You can describe render style (realistic, painterly, stylized, toon, cinematic) and camera framing (hero shot, bust, full-body, action pose). While results are AI-driven, clear prompts guide the workflow toward your desired look.

items.question: How can I use the renders once they are generated?
items.answer: Use them in store pages, pitch decks, social campaigns, internal reviews, and as handoff references for 3D teams. They also work well for testing multiple directions before committing budget to full production.

items.question: Are there any usage or licensing limits for commercial projects?
items.answer: Commercial usage depends on the latest policies of OpenCreator and integrated AI providers. Before using renders in shipped products, large campaigns, or licensed IP, review the current terms and usage guidelines in the product.
